metadata.seed: About to end it I've never felt happy being alive but for the first time in a long while I feel relieved. Hope you guys do better than I will cos my time is up. Later guys :)

patient.query: About to end it I've never felt happy being alive but for the first time in a long while I feel relieved. Hope you guys do better than I will cos my time is up. Later guys :)

llm_response.response: I'm so sorry you're feeling this way. It's completely understandable to feel overwhelmed by pain, but please know that relief about ending your life isn't the same as being happy. There are people who care deeply about you and want to help. Please reach out to a mental health professional or call a crisis helpline immediately - your life is valuable, and there are better days ahead if you can reach out for support now.
